mapper.sql: a.uuid AS "uuid", a.party_id AS "partyId", a.symbol AS "symbol", a.order_no AS "orderNo", a.direction AS "direction", a.unit_amount AS "unitAmount", a.amount_close AS "amountClose", a.fee AS "fee", a.deposit AS "deposit", a.deposit_open AS "depositOpen", a.profit AS "profit", a.trade_avg_price AS "tradeAvgPrice", a.stop_price_profit AS "stopPriceProfit", a.stop_price_loss AS "stopPriceLoss", a.pips AS "pips", a.pips_amount AS "pipsAmount", a.state AS "state", a.lever_rate AS "leverRate", a.volume AS "volume", a.volume_open AS "volumeOpen", a.close_time AS "closeTime", a.close_avg_price AS "closeAvgPrice", a.create_by AS "createBy", a.create_time AS "createTime", a.update_by AS "updateBy", a.update_time AS "updateTime", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_time_ts AS "createTimeTs", a.update_time_ts AS "updateTimeTs"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_contract_order a
WHERE a.uuid = #{id} and a.del_flag = 0
